description_long: This bicycle parking rack is constructed from a series of sturdy, curved metal loops affixed to a horizontal base bar, forming multiple parallel slots for securing bicycles. The loops are evenly spaced and rise vertically from the base, creating arch-like supports that allow for the insertion of bicycle wheels or frames. The entire structure is finished in a matte black color, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments. The design is open and minimal, with no additional decorative elements or integrated signage. The rack appears robust and capable of accommodating several bicycles side by side, with each loop providing a secure point for locking. Its construction suggests durability and resistance to outdoor weather conditions, making it ideal for placement on sidewalks, near transit stations, or in public parks.
description: A black metal bicycle rack with multiple arched loops for parking and locking bikes, mounted on a horizontal base. The design is open, sturdy, and suitable for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the rack with all arched loops visible and evenly spaced along the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the rack and the arching profile of the loops extending from the base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the parallel arrangement of the loops and the solid base bar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the curved loops and the open structure from the other end.
